provenance.notes: Maps only fields genuinely determinable from a Savings Plans inventory. paymentOption uses the same vocabulary as FOCUS ContractCommitmentPaymentModel. The three constants are invariant facts of the Savings Plans product: it is a discount commitment (BenefitCategory=Discount), applies continuously to eligible usage (Model=Continuous), and commits to an hourly spend rate (FulfillmentInterval=Hourly). ContractCommitmentLastUpdated and ContractCommitmentApplicability are NOT emitted (not present in the export) — the client supplies them and coverage reporting shows the residual gap. OfferCategory is left out because a Savings Plan may be public or under a negotiated agreement, which the export does not distinguish.
